free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of protons on Sm-148,
Sm-154, and Yb-174
English translation
The telescopic system consisting of two
dE/dx counters and one E surface barrier silicon
counter was used.
Free film was used as a target.
An error of elastic scattering cross
section at the angles more than 30 degr. was 2-3% and
at the angle of 20 degr. it was 5%. Accuracy of peak
separation, elastic scattering background, statistics,
and in some cases contribution of impurities were
taken into account. Only in some cases the errors
exceed 10%. Inelastic cross section measurements
were characterized by smaller errors (2-4%) due to
the less contribution of elastic scattering.
An error of the absolute normalization
